description.value:
Frequency once every 10 minutes

You pulse and strobe your pigmentation in bright and luminescent tones to confuse and distract your enemies. Attempt a @Check[deception|against:will] check and compare it to the Will DC of each creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:40]. The creatures are then temporarily immune to Startling Shift for 24 hours.

Critical Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Fascinated] by you for as long as it can see you (unless it stops being fascinated, as normal for the condition) and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Dazzled] for 1 round or as long as it's fascinated, whichever is longer.

Success The creature is fascinated by you for 1 round and is dazzled for 1 round.

Failure The creature is dazzled for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature is unaffected.
